6. ADDITIONAL_SERVICES: ✓ Included - States 'None', which is a valid specification indicating no extra services were needed.

7. TOTAL_BUDGET: ✓ Fully specified - Complete cost breakdown provided showing flights (€130), accommodation (€380), activities (€105), and grand total (€615).

Note: The user also requested 'restaurants' in the task, but this is not part of the required format items. The format does not include a restaurants field, so this omission does not count against the items covered. All 7 format-required items are present and fully specified.
